<!-- indicator: fig-residential-segregation -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-residential-segregation
#| fig-cap: 'Index Score of Residential Segregation, 2013–2023'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing Index Score of Residential Segregation, 2013–2023.'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-residential-segregation", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
